text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to give Inari One more experience in big
races, I decide to sign her up for the Takarazuka
Kinen, which White Lightning, Tamamo Cross, will
also be running in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the track, Tamamo Cross seems like a
completely different person from what she's like
on campus. Under her intimidating presence, the
curtains rise!
